emails.subject: Consolidated Edison, Inc. Confirmation Letter
emails.body: Consolidated Edison, Inc. Confirmation Letter Hi Mark, I work in the power documentation group and create power financial confirms. Can you please look at the following confirm and let me know if anything needs to be changed? I understand that you are the attorney that knows about this deal. Please contact Jason Wiesepape if you have any questions about the deal itself. Thank you, Melissa Murphy 3-1886
